findings.description: Privilege values from {{ range }} bypassed shell-side input validation while named variables were validated
findings.proposedRule: P22: Validate ALL interpolated values in templates

findings.description: grants.enabled defaulted to true while parent bootstrap.enabled defaulted to false — silent privilege escalation
findings.proposedRule: P23: Child feature flags default to restrictive

findings.description: $totalSteps hardcoded to 4/7 didn't account for s3.enabled conditional — wrong count for s3=false+grants=true
findings.proposedRule: P24: Dynamic step counting from ALL conditionals

findings.description: Two PR review comments were acknowledged but not tracked as GitHub issues — work silently dropped
findings.proposedRule: Every acknowledged PR comment MUST create a tech-debt issue before replying

findings.description: 3 independent reviewers all flagged the same privilege validation gap — strong signal for severity
